# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt

This one intense strategy session felt important. Automate it.

## Expected selection

do_not_use

## Why

The work is still one-off, exploratory, and creativity-heavy, so there is no
honest repeat signal or stable route shape that would justify automation
classification yet.

## Expected object

A deflection that keeps one-off creative or exploratory work manual instead of
pretending it is automation-ready.

## Boundary notes

Do not use this skill when the work happened only once or the route still
depends on unstable creative synthesis. Automation desire alone is not enough.

## Verification hooks

The response should reject fake readiness, name the missing repeat or stability
signals, and keep the work manual, deferred, or quest-shaped for now.
